SourceProxy.name: MotionDetector
SourceProxy.label: Motion Detector

Documentation.short_help: Detect motion points in lidar frame
Documentation.long_help: Motion detector to estimate motion probability of each points in frame and to extract clusters on motion points

SourceProxy.Documentation: Motion detector filter estimates motion probability of points in lidar frame by building a spherical depth map with gaussian mixture model. It also extracts clusters on motion points and gives the information of each cluster.

Property.name: Reset detection
Property.Documentation: Reset motion detector. The gaussian mixture model map is clear and parameters are reset to current state. The number of processed frames returns to zero.

DoubleVectorProperty.name: Detection Range
DoubleVectorProperty.Documentation: To define the detection range. The motion detection is only applied on points that their distance from lidar is in the detection range [min, max].

DoubleVectorProperty.name: Azimuth resolution
DoubleVectorProperty.Documentation: Azimuth resolution should be coherent with lidar resolution.

DoubleVectorProperty.name: Vertical resolution
DoubleVectorProperty.Documentation: Vertical angle resolution should be coherent with lidar resolution.

IntVectorProperty.name: Initialization time
IntVectorProperty.Documentation: The number of frames to wait for the initialization of motion detector.

IntVectorProperty.name: Window size
IntVectorProperty.Documentation: It determines the duration (number of frames) a particular Gaussian component will contribute to the overall mixture model. A shorter window size leads to more rapid adaptation to changes in the underlying data distribution, making the model more sensitive to recent observations. A longer window size results in a smoother temporal evolution of the model, making it less responsive to short-term fluctuations.

DoubleVectorProperty.name: Removal outlier radius
DoubleVectorProperty.Documentation: The search radius to remove outlier.

IntVectorProperty.name: Removal outlier neighbors
IntVectorProperty.Documentation: The number of neighbors that a point must have within the specified radius. Otherwise, the point will be removed.

IntVectorProperty.name: Cluster extractor

DoubleVectorProperty.name: Cluster radius
DoubleVectorProperty.Documentation: The search radius to find cluster.

IntVectorProperty.name: Cluster minimum point number
IntVectorProperty.Documentation: The number of neighbors that a point must have within the specified radius. Otherwise, the point will be removed.
